flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Lemoore College fell 42% between 2007 and 2009 (71.7% → 41.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lemoore College rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($552 → $624).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lemoore College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lemoore College rose 85% between 2006 and 2009 (1.9k → 3.6k).
